KraterNr. mit Profilbuchstabe, Vegetation, Latitude(Tiefpunkt), Longitude(Tiefpunkt), Hillslope Azimuth, Kraterradius (m), Höhenunterschied (m), Wasserscheide erkennbar?, r1(D 1D)(m), t1(D 1D)(a), t2(D 1D)(a), D (1D)(m^2/a),   Volume to ref Margin (m3), r1 (ref 2D)(m), t1(ref 2D)(a), t2 (ref 2D)(a), D 2D 0.9 to ref margin (m^2/a), D 2D from fit to ref margin (m^2/a), Volume to devide (m3), r1 (devide 2D)(m), t1(devide 2D)(a), t2(devide 2D) (a), D 2D 0.9 to devide (m^2/a), D 2D from fit to devide (m^2/a)
